name: Nobleman Quillon
description: In the aftermath of the Council's crushing defeat under the walls of Brynn, many patricians decided to purchase themself a quillon to at least partly resemble Duke di Berro, whose daring deeds allowed the Magistrate to emerge victorious.
descriptionZh: 王廷军布林城下惨败，公爵驰援守军，战功赫赫。城内很多贵族为了模仿迪·贝罗公爵的派头，纷纷给自己添置了一把基利翁。
